🏡 Serving New Jersey Communities

Making a Difference One Child at a Time

I AM Hope NJ is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to breaking the cycle of poverty through compassionate programs supporting women and children across New Jersey.

💛 Donate Today Our Programs

"The mission of I AM Hope NJ, a subsidiary of The Abhay S. Mainkar Foundation, is to change the lives of women and children by breaking the cycle of poverty through compassionate programs — because hope is something everyone deserves."

What We Do

Our Programs

Year-round initiatives that bring real support to families in need across New Jersey.

🐣

Easter Basket Drive

Bringing joy to children during the Easter season with filled baskets and gifts for families in need.

🎒

Back to School Drive

Ensuring every child starts the school year prepared with backpacks and supplies they need to succeed.

🍽️

Feed the Homeless

Providing warm meals and essentials to those experiencing homelessness in our communities.

🧥

Warm the Children

Distributing coats, gloves, and winter clothing to keep children warm during cold NJ winters.

🎁

The Christmas Gift

Making the holiday season magical for children and families who might otherwise go without.

🎓

Scholarships

Awarding scholarships to underprivileged students to help them pursue higher education and brighter futures.

Organizations & Communities We Serve
🏠

Local Family Shelters

Essentials for families in transitional housing across Morris County

🍱

Food Pantries & Soup Kitchens

Meal drives for those experiencing food insecurity

🏫

Title I Schools

Back to school drives for under-resourced students

👩‍👧

Single-Parent Families

Holiday and seasonal drives for families who need it most

🤝

Salerno Duane Genesis

Drop-off partner in Denville, NJ

🎨

Paint 'n Place Denville

Community drop-off site and proud local supporter

Voices From Our Community

The Easter basket drive brought so much joy to our children. It reminded us that our community cares and that we are not alone.

— NJ Family Recipient

My kids had everything they needed for school because of their backpack drive. I AM Hope NJ showed up for us when we needed it most.

— Morris County Parent

As a partner organization, we've seen firsthand the dedication of the I AM Hope NJ team. They truly live their mission every single day.

— Community Partner

The People Behind the Mission

Meet Our Team

From our founding board to our passionate Junior Board, meet the dedicated people who make I AM Hope NJ possible.

```
```

Maria Anna Koukoularis

Founder & President

Maria started this mission in 1999, wanting to bring hope to children in NJ homeless shelters. What began as an Easter basket drive has grown into a full organization touching thousands of lives.

Make an Impact

Your Gift Changes Lives

Every dollar goes directly toward programs that feed, clothe, educate, and uplift women and children across New Jersey. I AM Hope NJ is a 501(c)(3) — your donation is fully tax-deductible.

Join Our Team of Volunteers

Our volunteers are the heart of everything we do. From setting up events to mentoring in our Junior Board program, there are meaningful ways to give back.

  • Help organize our annual Casino Night fundraiser
  • Assist with Easter Basket and Christmas Gift drives
  • Support Back to School and warm clothing distributions
  • Mentor youth through our Junior Board program
  • Help with community outreach and awareness
  • Support scholarship program administration
Get Involved →

Already a volunteer? Log in on the left to access sign-up sheets, the meeting calendar, and team resources.
